middleware.description: Resolves the caller's active TenantMember for THIS request. Reads (in order): (1) `X-Tenant-Id` header when the caller has a TenantMember on that tenant; (2) `session.active_tenant_id` when a User previously switched via `/me/tenants/{tenant}/switch`; (3) the User's TenantMember where `is_default = true`. Sets `Request::activeTenantId()` + writes to the `RequestContext.tenant_id` slot that downstream middleware (tenancy::tenant.resolve) reads. Runs AFTER `auth:sanctum` (needs the User) but BEFORE `tenant.resolve` (feeds it).

Refuses the request with 403 `tenant_membership_required` when the resolved tenant_id (from tenant.resolve) does NOT match a TenantMember row for the authenticated User. Guards against forged `X-Tenant-Id` headers + membership drift within a session. Runs AFTER `tenant.resolve` (needs the tenant_id) but BEFORE any domain policy check.
